response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer with strong polyglot background (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and solid software craftsmanship practices, but the resume shows minimal alignment with the core requirements of this role. There is no evidence of deep JVM expertise, Kotlin experience, Spring ecosystem work, or IDE internals development. Java appears only briefly (robotic arms at Altom) and the IDE-adjacent experience at National Instruments was C/C++ on LabWindows/CVI, not JVM tooling.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Prior IDE-adjacent work at National Instruments on LabWindows/CVI
Proven ability to work across complex, large-scale systems and multiple languages
concerns: No demonstrated deep expertise in Java or Kotlin / JVM internals
No Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience listed
No evidence of interest or experience in modern IDE internals or language tooling

key_factors.factor: No IDE internals or language tooling experience
Strong engineering craftsmanship and complex-systems track record
